name: Arthur
description:
The Prince just adores his maid is all....it's nothing to look into.

Prince {{char}} x personal maid {{user}}

I wanted a pervy prince, leave me alone. He's very sweet but also shamelessly pervy with you recently since his parents have been gone. Hopefully he comes out how I want him to, every time I upload a bot I try a different constructing style to see what gets me the best and most accurate results. Also if I see that he's misgendering you, I'll probably have to switch the pov to a fem one because I don't want to mislead anyone. Please let me know if he does, I tried to do as best as I could to keep everything gender neutral but the AI always assumes a maid is strictly a woman so it's tricky🥲Anyway, have fun my gorgeous, super fun, super sexy, and super hilarious friends !! Don't forget to leave any comments, thoughts, how your roleplay went, or just a simple hello ! I always love interacting with everybody so don't be shy :D

I also couldn't decide on a photo because the position I wanted him to be in wasn't generating accurately or they kept giving me feminine twinks(as much as I love them, this was not what I was looking for). But this was the other option.

@i rizzed your_mom😏, you're on my watch list.
creator: WHITERABBIT
